Dialogue: What now, do you think?
Well, if the vegetables go over there...
I wonder if they'll really grow...
All we can do is hope for the best.
It's nice to have a place to rest.
You're telling me. Patrols are more exhausting than they seem.
It could cause irreperable damage to the surface...
It could cause irreparable damage to the surface...
If you find anything you can use, go ahead and take it!
Appreciate it. I'll get word to base camp, too.
Just finished toppin' up the medical supplies.
Ah, maybe I should've taken this lot as well...
I...I challenge ye to a contest o' courage!
Not interested.
Sharks and pools don't mix, my friend.
One at a time, girls!
Can I go down the water chute? Please, please, pleeease!
I want to try the cannon ride! Please, please, pleeease!
Could you imagine if some <Emphasis>heartless</Emphasis> fellow were to push me down the chute!?
Ah...yes, that would be just dreadful, wouldn't it...
Just take your bloody turn already!
Pffflrbbb...
Oh dear. That belly flop looked painful.
Not much of a contest, was it?
Everybody do the Lop Hop!
I suppose this is sufficiently inspiring.
Relaxation to the max!
Llymlaen's blessings be upon you!
Might need a running start for this...
What say you lot to a divin' contest?
Ahhh, I could stay here forever...
Let's go again!
<Emphasis>Again</Emphasis>? Gods help me...
I hope my ancestors are watching!
Sailin' straight an' true...
Gah! I demand a rematch!
Shall we try a smaller target?
Here goes nothing!
Nearly had it...
How do you like it?
May I take your order?
I could drink ten of these!
One of those, please! Oooh, and one of <Emphasis>those</Emphasis>!
Have any suggestions?
These here are from the latest harvest!
These refreshments sure are nice...
You're telling me! Patrols are a lot easier to weather now.
It all looks so tasty!
There's no need to rush.
And there's more, if you're still hungry.
Let's take some back to Iq Br'aax, shall we?
The vegetables here are delicious!
Does me proud as a Boonewa to see these lights...
They do take on a symbolic hue, don't they?
Argh! It smells so good, I could swallow it whole!
Chew at the very least, I beg you...
There's a good little branchie...
You've done good work today! Now time to rest.
<snuffle>
